commit_scope: fourth-kernel.form m4a: the minimal surface — the four primitive families (intern, observe, offer, port) as one recipe-callable door each, proven three-way at verdict 31, with the BMF thread/choice lane and the axiom-3 save/restore gift proven as their own claims. MS-PAIR registered at 1.2.99.1300.

local_validation.summary: The surface holds three-way at 31: (1) intern — a nested composition separately built is the same cell, swapped children are a different cell; (2) observe — arity and children read back, the nested child IS a freshly interned same-shape cell, the leaf value returns; (4) offer — a 3-deep node-counter-offer chain threads to its terminal, choice pops on fail (ack-0) through a nested cascade, a non-fail first answer commits; (8) port — text crosses the membrane out and returns identical; (16) save/restore free — a held composition survives composing over it untouched and the successor's child IS the held cell. Blueprint registry check clean: 0 unregistered type-99.

known_limitations.limitation: The intern door composes pairs (MS-PAIR); n-ary composition is reachable by nesting, and a dedicated n-ary door can join when a consumer needs it.
known_limitations.follow_up: m4b authors the walker over these doors; if n-ary intern earns its place there, it lands with its own band claim.

known_limitations.limitation: The port door proves the filesystem carrier; the lattice port and other carriers ride the same door shape but are proven by their own existing bands (persistence.fk, fs-crud).
known_limitations.follow_up: m4b composes against the door; carrier swaps stay behind it per resource-port.fk.

ci_validation.summary: PR gates run the three-way band; the registry check rides scan_form_blueprints --check.

deploy_validation.summary: form-stdlib additions ride the api image rebuild; the lattice ingests the updated fourth-kernel.form on the post-merge hook.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: No route behavior changes. The body gains the m4a portability contract: recipes authored against minimal-surface.fk's four doors run identically on every kernel that proves the band — the precondition for m4b (the walker as recipes) and the fourth kernel's bootstrap ladder.
test_flows: minimal-surface-band proves the four doors three-way at verdict 31: intern content-address law, observe round-trip, offer ack-threading with BMF choice/fail, port membrane round-trip, and the axiom-3 save/restore gift.
scan_form_blueprints --check proves MS-PAIR is registered, not magic: 0 unregistered type-99 literals.
e2e_validation.summary: validate.sh end-to-end across Go/Rust/TS: 1 ok, 0 divergent, verdict 31.

phase_gate.gate: the four doors proven three-way locally; CI three-way + deploy ingest confirm the crossing
phase_gate.next: m4b — the walker authored as recipes over the surface, run interpreted on the existing kernels (correct before fast)
